zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Littlebury de Horne於1434年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾邦藍時，她的父親Sir William Littlebury Horne Lord Mayor of London26歲，母親Jana Wilascot14歲。她於大約1448年與John Gyll在英國賀特福爾邦藍聖 安德也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1499年在英國賀特福爾邦藍享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾邦藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Littlebury de Horne于1434年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾邦藍时，她的父亲Sir William Littlebury Horne Lord Mayor of London26岁，母亲Jana Wilascot14岁。她于大约1448年与John Gyll在英国賀特福爾邦藍聖 安德也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1499年在英国賀特福爾邦藍享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾邦藍。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Horne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, German, and Dutch: variant of   Horn  .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads mostly so named from the dative singular of horn (see Horn ).

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Littlebury de Horne was born in 1434, in Buckland, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Littlebury Horne Lord Mayor of London, was 26 and her mother, Jana Wilascot, was 14. She married John Gyll about 1448, in St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1499, in Buckland, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Buckland, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Littlebury de Horne est née en 1434, à Buckland, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Littlebury Horne Lord Mayor of London, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jana Wilascot, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé John Gyll environ 1448, à St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1499, à Buckland, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Buckland, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordsh: St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Littlebury de Horne 1434 in Buckland, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Littlebury Horne Lord Mayor of London 26 und ihre Mutter Jana Wilascot 14. Sie hat um 1448 in St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordshire, England John Gyll geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1499 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Buckland, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Buckland, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato John Gyll circa 1448, nel St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Littlebury de Horneが1434年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアブックランドで生まれた時，父Sir William Littlebury Horne Lord Mayor of Londonは26歳，母Jana Wilascotは14歳であった。約1448年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアブックランドスト アンドリュー'ス チャーチでJohn Gyllと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1499年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアブックランドで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアブックランドにて埋葬された。

ko.St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordsh: 영국 허트퍼드실르 벅랜드 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Littlebury de Horne(이)가 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 벅랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Littlebury Horne Lord Mayor of London(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jana Wilascot(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 대략 1448년 영국 허트퍼드실르 벅랜드 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치에서 John Gyll(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1499년 영국 허트퍼드실르 벅랜드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 벅랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Littlebury de Horne nasceu em 1434, em Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Littlebury Horne Lord Mayor of London, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jana Wilascot, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com John Gyll aproximadamente 1448, em St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1499, em Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordsh: ст андрю'с чурч, буккланд, хиртфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Littlebury de Horne родилась в 1434 г. в местности буккланд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Littlebury Horne Lord Mayor of London было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jana Wilascot, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Gyll около 1448 г. в местности ст андрю'с чурч, буккланд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1499 г. в местности буккланд, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности буккланд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Littlebury de Horne nació en 1434, en Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Littlebury Horne Lord Mayor of London, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jana Wilascot, tenía 14 años. Se casó con John Gyll aproximadamente 1448, en St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1499, en Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
